channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BRIGHOTEL] Brigade Hotel Ventures Board to meet for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will be closed from April 1, 2026, to April 30, 2026. Following the board meeting, the company will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 2:30 PM IST, where senior management will discuss the Q4 FY26 financial and operational performance.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to April 30, 2026.
  • Conference call to discuss results on April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ESPIRE] Espire Hospitality Responds to Exchange Query on Price Movement
item.description:
Espire Hospitality Limited clarified to the stock exchange that the recent price and volume movement in its shares is purely due to market conditions. The company stated that it has no pending information or announcements required to be disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, or any other event that could impact the company's operations or performance. Espire Hospitality affirms that it regularly shares all material information with the stock exchanges as per LODR regulations.

  • Espire Hospitality confirms no undisclosed information impacting operations.
  • Share price movement attributed to market conditions.
  • Company complies with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • All material information is regularly disclosed to exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Espire Hospitality Limited | Category: Clarification

item.title: [INDOSMC] INDO SMC Bags ₹28.43 Cr Order for HT Air Insulated Bus Duct
item.description:
🔥 Trending

INDO SMC Ltd has announced the receipt of a significant purchase order valued at ₹28.428 Crores (excluding tax). The order, from a prominent Indian mining and steel company, is for the supply of 4,120 Sq. Mtrs of HT Air Insulated Bus Duct for 630 AMP metal-enclosed systems. These bus ducts are crucial for high-tension power distribution in industrial settings. The company is required to complete the supply within twelve weeks. This order underscores INDO SMC's robust execution capabilities and its established, long-term relationships with key customers in the industrial sector.

  • INDO SMC secured a ₹28.43 Cr purchase order.
  • Order is for HT Air Insulated Bus Duct from a major Indian mining and steel company.
  • Supply of 4,120 Sq. Mtrs to be completed within 12 weeks.
  • Highlights strong execution capabilities and customer relationships.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDO SMC Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [BHARATWIRE] BWR clarifies price/volume movement due to market forces
item.description:
Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd (BWR) has issued a clarification regarding recent price and volume movements in its shares, following an inquiry from NSE and BSE dated April 20, 2026. The company affirmed its compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. BWR stated that neither the company nor its promoter(s) possess any price-sensitive information or material events that could influence the scrip's price or volume behavior. The company clarified that any observed price/volume fluctuations are solely attributable to market forces and not due to any undisclosed material information.

  • BWR responded to exchange queries on price/volume increase.
  • Company confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive information.
  • Promoters also have no material events to disclose.
  • Price/volume movements are attributed to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SHYAMMETL] Shyam Metalics expands Pakuria ops with 2 new furnaces & foil separator
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shyam Metalics and Energy Limited has expanded its production capabilities at its Pakuria facility by commissioning two new annealing furnaces and a 2300 mm Vertical Foil Separator (LGSS). The furnaces, with capacities of 25 MT p.a. and 30 MT p.a. respectively, are expected to streamline the annealing process, improve production efficiency, and enhance product consistency and quality. The new foil separator will enable precise separation of Ultra-Light Gauge and Light Gauge foil (6-15 microns), allowing the company to cater to specialized customer requirements. These upgrades aim to improve process control, strengthen manufacturing capabilities, and expand value-added product offerings, aligning with the company's strategy to enhance manufacturing strength and meet evolving market demand.

  • Shyam Metalics expanded production capabilities at its Pakuria facility.
  • Two new annealing furnaces (25 MT & 30 MT p.a.) commenced commercial production.
  • A 2300 mm Vertical Foil Separator (LGSS) was also commissioned.
  • Upgrades enhance production efficiency, product quality, and specialized offerings.
  • This expansion is part of a broader plan to strengthen manufacturing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [MOUNT] Mount Housing: Trading Window Closed for Q4 FY26 Results
item.description:
Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is effective from April 1st, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter ended March 31st, 2026, are made public. This action is in compliance with the company's Code of Conduct designed to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders.

  • Trading window closed for Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd.
  • Effective from April 1, 2026, for Q4 FY26 results.
  • Applies to designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure is as per insider trading code of conduct.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mount Housing and Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [SHADOWFAX] Shadowfax Launches 'Shadowfax 360' Digital Shipping Platform for SMEs & D2C
item.description:
Shadowfax Technologies Limited has launched 'Shadowfax 360', a proprietary unified digital shipping portal designed for Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) and Direct to Consumer (D2C) brands. The platform enables businesses to register and commence shipping nationwide in minutes, covering over 15,000 pincodes across 2,500 cities. Key features include a transparent flat-rate billing model, one-click integrations with major sales channels like Shopify and WooCommerce, an AI-driven RTO Predictor, and the industry's fastest Cash on Delivery (COD) remittance cycles. Shadowfax 360 imposes no minimum order requirements, making enterprise-grade logistics accessible to all SMEs. This launch is expected to drive new customer acquisition and diversify the company's merchant base.

  • Shadowfax launched 'Shadowfax 360' digital shipping platform for SMEs and D2C brands.
  • The platform offers flat-rate billing, fast COD remittances, and no minimum order requirements.
  • It provides immediate access to an enterprise-grade network covering 15,000+ pincodes.
  • The initiative aims to scale the seller ecosystem and diversify Shadowfax's merchant base.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shadowfax Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RAJRAYON] Raj Rayon not a 'Large Corporate' as per SEBI debt issuance norms
item.description:
Raj Rayon Industries Ltd has informed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a 'Large Corporate' (LC) as of March 31, 2026. This declaration is in reference to SEBI circulars (SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 and SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613) concerning fund raising by issuance of debt securities by large entities. The company confirms its non-applicability under the framework and criteria outlined in these circulars, meaning specific disclosure requirements for large corporates regarding debt issuance do not apply to Raj Rayon.

  • Raj Rayon confirms non-applicability as a 'Large Corporate'.
  • This status is as per SEBI circulars for debt security issuance.
  • The classification is effective as of March 31, 2026.
  • Specific disclosure requirements for LCs do not apply to the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Raj Rayon Industries Limited-$ | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [GRMOVER] GRM Launches 10X Basmati Rice for Diabetics
item.description:
GRM Overseas Limited has announced the launch of its "10X Basmati Rice Suitable for Diabetics." This strategic initiative aims to expand the company's health-focused product portfolio in both domestic and international markets. The new product addresses the increasing demand for healthier dietary choices, driven by rising diabetes prevalence and health awareness. The 10X Basmati Rice combines premium basmati qualities with characteristics supporting better glycaemic management, offering low GI and high fiber without compromising taste. This launch reinforces GRM's vision to evolve from a traditional rice exporter into a diversified, consumer-centric food company. The diabetic food market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6-8% globally and approximately 10% in India.

  • GRM launched "10X Basmati Rice Suitable for Diabetics" to expand its health-focused portfolio.
  • The product targets growing demand for diabetic-friendly food in domestic and international markets.
  • It offers low GI and high fiber, maintaining premium basmati taste and aroma.
  • This aligns with GRM's strategy to diversify beyond traditional rice exports.
  • The diabetic food market shows significant growth potential, especially in India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRM OVERSEAS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CANFINHOME] Can Fin Homes: Dy. MD Vikram Saha resigns due to Parent Bank transfer
item.description:
Shri Vikram Saha, Deputy Managing Director and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of Can Fin Homes Ltd, has resigned from his position. His resignation is effective from the commencement of business hours on April 15, 2026. The reason cited for his departure is a transfer by the Parent Bank. The company submitted his resignation letter, dated April 14, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Vikram Saha, Dy. MD & KMP, resigned from Can Fin Homes.
  • Resignation is effective from April 15, 2026.
  • Reason for resignation is transfer by Parent Bank.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Regulation 30.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAN FIN HOMES LTD. | Category: Management Change
